data.dialogueLine: Well done, you’ve completed the first activity successfully, and moved closer
Truth? What the hell are you on about!? You're trying to kill us!
Incorrect. Do you not recall what I said a few moments ago?
Then again, you are here to learn, so it is not like I expect you to have wisdom.
Just as I did, through direct experience, you will gradually learn to see things for as they really are.
Your victory was not a result of any of you. It was a result of all of you.
